betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The speed at which a crop grows is based on its Nutrient Score. There are a number of different ways to obtain Nutrient Points for your crops, but to keep your crops from getting sick try to make sure they are always receiving at least a couple of the below bonuses:

§l- +10 Points§r can be gained from having water in your crop sticks.
§l- +10 Points§r can be gained from having fertilizer in your crop sticks.
§l- +2 Points§r can be gained from allowing the crop to see the sky.
       - Crops in the Industrial Farm will always have this bonus.
§l- +28 Points§r can be gained from preferred biome tags
       - [warn]If no preferred tags are found[/warn], high humidity will §rgive up to §l+14 Points.§r 
       - See more on this in the Environmental Preferences quest.

All crops have a base Nutrient Score of 5.

You can check the Nutrient Score of a crop by using a Portable Scanner on any crop sticks or Industrial Farm controller, even if it's empty.

Crop tier determines the Nutrient Score requirements for growth. 
The following cutoffs apply:

§lTier 4 §r- Last tier where crops can be planted anywhere

§lTier 5 §r- Last tier where crops can be planted anywhere as long as they can see the sky

§lTier 11 §r- Last tier where crop can be anywhere as long as crops are in an 80%+ biome

§lTier 12 §r- Last tier where crops can be anywhere as long as crops are in a 80%+ biome and can see the sky
